column8: Rounded and subrounded COBBLES, fine to coarse GRAVEL and CONCRETE. (FILL)
Rounded and subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL. No recovery assumed finer material washed out.

Moderately strong to moderately weak, brownish grey, spotted black and yellow, moderately to highly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, narrow to very narrow, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 15 degrees to 35 degrees.
Strong, pinkish grey, spotted black and white, slightly decomposed medium grained GRANITE with closely to medium spaced, very narrow, rough undulating, clean joints, dipping 5 degrees to 10 degrees.
